CustomField.description: Populated by L.FLOW 4100: Interaction Rules to lookup the rule that this lead applies to. If rule is edited, the lead can be edited and the rule will run again.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Populated by L.FLOW 4100: Interaction Rules to lookup the rule that this lead applies to. If rule is edited, the lead can be edited and the rule will run again.
CustomField.label: Assignment Rule
